description.ko: 로맨틱한 미래 배경에서 거대한 인디고 구조물과 선명한 네온 빛의 궤적이 특징인 비 내리는 테크 누아르 도시 전경입니다.
description.en: A rainy, tech-noir cityscape featuring towering indigo structures and vibrant neon light trails in a romantic futuristic setting.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Neon Rain Arches.' Towering #1A0033 indigo megastructures are linked by bridges pulsing with #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan light. Intense monsoon rain creates fluid, neon-streaked reflections on wet metallic surfaces and glass walkways. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced puddle reflections, 8k resolution, capturing the moody and romantic futuristic atmosphere.
